title: mariscus pennatus
intro: Mariscus pennatus, also known as Sphagneticola trilobata, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Mariscus pennatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even show potential in lowering blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
